Package microui.component

Class TextField

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.core.base.SpatialView
microui.core.base.ContentView
microui.core.base.Component
microui.component.TextField
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeyPressable, Visible
public final class TextField extends Component implements KeyPressable
A single-line text input field with support for text editing, selection, copy/paste, undo/redo, validation, and password masking.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class microui.core.base.SpatialView

    SpatialView.HooksUpdateMode

  • Constructor Details

    • TextField

      public TextField(float x, float y, float w, float h)
      Constructs a TextField with specified position and dimensions. The text field is initialized with default styling and editing capabilities.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the text field's top-left corner
      y - the y-coordinate of the text field's top-left corner
      w - the width of the text field
      h - the height of the text field

    • TextField

      public TextField()
      Constructs a TextField with default maximum size, centered on the screen. This is a convenience constructor for creating a centered text field.

  • Method Details

    • getInputFilter

      public InputFilter getInputFilter()
      Returns the current input filter used for character validation.
      Returns:
      the input filter (never null)

    • setInputFilter

      public TextField setInputFilter(InputFilter inputFilter)
      Sets the input filter used for character validation.
      Parameters:
      inputFilter - the new input filter (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • getPasswordChar

      public char getPasswordChar()
      Gets the password mask character used in password mode.
      Returns:
      the current password mask character

    • setPasswordChar

      public TextField setPasswordChar(char passwordChar)
      Sets the password mask character used in password mode.
      Parameters:
      passwordChar - the character to use for masking passwords
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • isPasswordModeEnabled

      public boolean isPasswordModeEnabled()
      Checks if password mode is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if password mode is enabled, false otherwise

    • setPasswordModeEnabled

      public TextField setPasswordModeEnabled(boolean passwordModeEnabled)
      Enables or disables password mode. When enabled, entered characters are masked with the password character.
      Parameters:
      passwordModeEnabled - true to enable password masking, false to disable
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • isValidationEnabled

      public final boolean isValidationEnabled()
      Checks if input validation is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if validation is enabled, false otherwise

    • setValidationEnabled

      public TextField setValidationEnabled(boolean validation)
      Enables or disables input validation.
      Parameters:
      validation - true to enable validation, false to disable
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Checks if the text field is empty.
      Returns:
      true if no text is entered, false otherwise

    • setOnFocusChangedListener

      public TextField setOnFocusChangedListener(Listener onFocusChangedListener)
      Sets the listener to be called when the text field's focus changes.
      Parameters:
      onFocusChangedListener - the listener for focus changes
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the listener is null

    • setOnEnterPressedListener

      public TextField setOnEnterPressedListener(Listener onEnterPressedListener)
      Sets the listener to be called when the Enter key is pressed.
      Parameters:
      onEnterPressedListener - the listener for Enter key presses
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the listener is null

    • setOnTextChangedListener

      public TextField setOnTextChangedListener(Listener onTextChangedListener)
      Sets the listener to be called when the text content changes.
      Parameters:
      onTextChangedListener - the listener for text changes
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the listener is null

    • getFilterMode

      public FullSingleLineTextController.FilterMode getFilterMode()
      Returns the current filter mode used for character validation.
      Returns:
      the filter mode (never null)

    • setFilterModeMode

      public TextField setFilterModeMode(FullSingleLineTextController.FilterMode validationMode)
      Sets the filter mode for character validation.
      Parameters:
      validationMode - the new filter mode (must not be null)
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • getText

      public String getText()
      Gets the current text content. In password mode, returns the masked text.
      Returns:
      the current text content

    • getHiddenText

      public String getHiddenText()
      Gets the hidden text content (actual characters, not masked). Only meaningful in password mode.
      Returns:
      the actual text content without masking

    • setText

      public TextField setText(String text)
      Sets the text content.
      Parameters:
      text - the text to set
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • setText

      public TextField setText(StringBuilder text)
      Sets the text content from a StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      text - the StringBuilder containing text to set
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • isTextConstrainEnabled

      public boolean isTextConstrainEnabled()
      Checks if text length constraint is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if text length is constrained, false otherwise

    • setTextConstrainEnabled

      public TextField setTextConstrainEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Enables or disables text length constraint.
      Parameters:
      enabled - true to enable length constraint, false to disable
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • getMaxChars

      public int getMaxChars()
      Gets the maximum allowed characters when constraint is enabled.
      Returns:
      the maximum character limit

    • setMaxChars

      public TextField setMaxChars(int max)
      Sets the maximum allowed characters when constraint is enabled.
      Parameters:
      max - the maximum character limit
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • getDigitsStrict

      public int getDigitsStrict()
      Gets the number of digits when in digit-only validation mode.
      Returns:
      the number of digits

    • getDigitsOrDefault

      public int getDigitsOrDefault(int defaultValue)
      Gets the number of digits or returns a default value.
      Parameters:
      defaultValue - the default value to return if not in digit mode
      Returns:
      the number of digits, or defaultValue if not in digit mode

      Gets the text color.
      Returns:
      the current text color

      Gets the cursor color.
      Returns:
      the current cursor color

      Sets the cursor color.
      Parameters:
      color - the color for the cursor
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

      public AbstractColor getSelectionColor()
      Gets the selection highlight color.
      Returns:
      the current selection color

      public TextField setSelectionColor(AbstractColor color)
      Sets the selection highlight color.
      Parameters:
      color - the color for text selection highlighting
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • getTextSize

      public float getTextSize()
      Gets the text size in pixels.
      Returns:
      the current text size

    • setTextSize

      public TextField setTextSize(float size)
      Sets the text size in pixels. Minimum size is 1 pixel.
      Parameters:
      size - the text size to set
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • getCursorWeight

      public float getCursorWeight()
      Gets the cursor stroke weight (thickness).
      Returns:
      the current cursor weight

    • setCursorWeight

      public TextField setCursorWeight(float weight)
      Sets the cursor stroke weight (thickness). Valid range is 1 to 10 pixels.
      Parameters:
      weight - the cursor weight to set
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • getCursorBlinkRate

      public float getCursorBlinkRate()
      Gets the cursor blink rate. Higher values make the cursor blink faster.
      Returns:
      the current cursor blink rate

    • setCursorBlinkRate

      public TextField setCursorBlinkRate(float rate)
      Sets the cursor blink rate. Valid range is 1 to 30 (frames per blink cycle).
      Parameters:
      rate - the blink rate to set
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • getFont

      public processing.core.PFont getFont()
      Gets the current font.
      Returns:
      the current font, or null if using default font

    • setFont

      public TextField setFont(processing.core.PFont font)
      Sets the font for text rendering.
      Parameters:
      font - the font to use for text
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • getHint

      public String getHint()
      Gets the hint text displayed when the field is empty and not focused.
      Returns:
      the current hint text

    • setHint

      public TextField setHint(String hint)
      Sets the hint text displayed when the field is empty and not focused.
      Parameters:
      hint - the hint text to display
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • getHintColor

      public AbstractColor getHintColor()
      Gets the hint text color.
      Returns:
      the current hint color

    • setHintColor

      public TextField setHintColor(AbstractColor hintColor)
      Sets the hint text color.
      Parameters:
      hintColor - the color for hint text
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • isFocused

      public boolean isFocused()
      Checks if the text field currently has keyboard focus.
      Returns:
      true if focused, false otherwise

    • setFocused

      public TextField setFocused(boolean focused)
      Sets whether the text field has keyboard focus.
      Parameters:
      focused - true to give focus, false to remove focus
      Returns:
      this TextField instance for method chaining

    • keyPressed

      public void keyPressed(processing.event.KeyEvent e)
      Handles key press events for text editing and navigation. Only processes keys when the text field is focused.
      Specified by:
      keyPressed in interface KeyPressable
      Parameters:
      e - the key event
